jobDescription: With more than 100% year-over-year growth, managing IT and security is a challenge all on its own. As Algolia grows in the US & EMEA ( SF, Paris, NY, Atlanta, London), we’re looking for highly motivated engineers to maintain our velocity, scale and maintain our IT systems, and manage a diverse environment, which includes mac OS, Windows, Linux and all sorts of mobile devices. As part of the IT team, you’ll be able to find solutions for pain points of all employees in collaboration with other teams as well as maintain a high level of security for everyone. Together we'll continue to create a supportive environment for all Algolia employees. You'll be given a lot of freedom and responsibility in choosing, evaluating, deploying and maintaining various systems to support our IT operations at Algolia. RESPONSIBILITIESSupport, advise and help the team members in the US offices, keeping security in mind Support remote offices (occasional travel) Inventory and maintain IT asset data (serial numbers, software keys, locations, etc.) Manage and deploy the new device configurations (laptops and phones) for the US offices ( JAMF) Assist in the management of hosted applications ( Google Apps, Okta, etc.) Provide videoconferencing and live event support ( Zoom) REQUIREMENTSLearn fast Ability to self-prioritize tasks Flexibility, adaptability and initiative Excellent communication and customer service skills NICE TO HAVENotion of security best practices in the enterprise environment Familiarity with Mac OS required, Windows and Linux preferred Understanding of networking concepts preferred WE’ RE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO CAN LIVE OUR VALUESGRIT - Problem-solving and perseverance capability in an ever-changing and growing environment TRUST - Willingness to trust our co-workers and to take ownership CANDOR - Ability to receive and give constructive feedback. CARE - Genuine care about other team members, our clients and the decisions we make in the company. HUMILITY- Aptitude for learning from others, putting ego aside. BENEFITSPrivate Medical Insurance Life and Disability Insurance Business Travel Insurance Relocation support Company Canteen (high standard) Flexible work hours and unlimited time off PERKSCompetitive pay and equity Your choice of computer, phone, keyboard, you name it. Everything you need to be efficient Coaching and sponsorship to participate and speak at leading industry conferences Ongoing professional education opportunities through internal & external workshops, including public speaking, language learning ( English/ French) Fun: we spend time together — team building, socialising and making tools that encourage getting to know teammates across offices and continents. Charitable contribution matching Unique referral rewards program: refer a candidate, and we’ll donate to your charity of choice Corporate flats available for the first months of relocation and when you travel to different offices Fully stocked kitchens Team workouts Meals & happy hours
